title: Preserve exact financial arithmetic
description: All stored and derived monetary values use exact base-10 semantics with no binary floating-point rounding in persisted facts or aggregates.
target: 100% of conformance examples round-trip Signed Account Amount exactly; Net Account Movement equals the exact signed selected sum; External Spend equals positive qualifying outflow magnitudes minus active in-set refund magnitudes with transfer principal and unrelated inflows excluded; Budget Actual applies that formula to the active category allocation.
load_condition: All supported transaction, transfer, refund, correction, and query paths.
measurement: Automated conformance tests use boundary decimals, mixed signs, cross-period refunds, partial refunds, transfers, fees, cash withdrawals, corrections, empty sets, and repeated aggregation to check each named formula independently.
rationale: Rounding or semantic drift would make all later budgets and insights untrustworthy. Supports G2, G4, and G6.
